home.heroSubtitle: Each piece is unique, crafted with passion and expertise.
home.marquee: Artisan craftsmanship  ✦  Made in France  ✦  A unique signature  ✦
home.visionText: At Arno Polynice, every garment tells a story. We believe in responsible, artisanal fashion that celebrates handwork and the choice of noble materials. Far from fast fashion, our creations are designed to last and accompany those who wear them in their personal expression.

account.name: Name

history.myStoryText1: The name Arno Polynice was not chosen at random. Born in Haiti and adopted, along with my brother Wilguens, by a Vosgian family at the age of one, I grew up between two cultures. My French first name, Arno, and my Haitian surname, Polynice, symbolize this dual identity that accompanies and inspires me every day.
history.myStoryText2: In creating my brand, I wanted to give it a name that tells this personal story, made of contrasts, roots and pride.
history.productsText1: Founded in 2024, Arno Polynice is an independent brand of unisex clothing, designed and manufactured in France. Each piece is conceived as an alliance between simplicity, modernity and authenticity. The style is both chic, relaxed and streetwear, ideal for those who want to assert their style without compromising comfort.
history.productsText2: Each creation is unique, crafted with care and passion, to offer everyday clothes that have a real personality.
history.dnaQuote: A sunlit look, between character and elegance.
history.dnaText1: Shot under the southern sun, this set embodies a modern vision of the contemporary wardrobe. The short jacket with a structured design, central zip, shirt collar and vertical pleats matches the trousers. The finishes are sober and chic thanks to discreet metal rivets.
history.dnaText2: The silhouette, both wide, modern and refined, is a style halfway between workwear and chic minimalism. The pleated trousers have rivets at the front pleats. The pockets are inserted into the side seams. The fitted waist and oversized cut provide maximum volume, ease and comfort.
history.dnaText3: These sets are made of navy blue wool twill and dark grey cotton twill.
history.eveningText1: There are clothes you wear, and others you inhabit. This set is one of the latter.
history.eveningText2: In a deep anthracite with discreet reflections, the jacket hugs the body with soft authority, while the wide trousers fall in perfect columns — a silhouette that is both rigorous and free.
history.eveningText3Part1: But what catches the eye is the embroidery. Rivers of crystals run and flow on the fabric in fluid lines, gliding from the jacket to the legs of the trousers like a constellation in motion. Each stitch was placed by hand using the ancestral Lunéville technique, a craft born in Lorraine in the
history.eveningText3Part2: century — a crocheted needle, a precise gesture, infinite patience, which Marie Torres has mastered to perfection.
history.eveningText4: Wearing this set means choosing craftsmanship over the ephemeral. The human hand over the machine.
history.eveningText5: She does not enter a room. She becomes its center of gravity.
history.eveningCaption: Lunéville embroidery, entirely handmade by Marie Torres — unique piece worn by Anais Drion.
history.collabText1: Arno Polynice is a brand that loves change and collaborations with artists from other worlds. Here we see the singer Meloofchrist wearing one of our creations.
history.collabText2: This jacket is 100% designed for him and with him. Each element was chosen to reflect as much as possible the artistic direction and the universe of the artist while also shaping it in our image.
history.summerQuote: A shirt that dares simplicity and detail.
history.summerText1: This two-tone shirt made in a lightweight seersucker is the ideal shirt for summer. The many discreet patch pockets perfectly embody the simplicity the designer wanted to express.
history.summerText2: Its oversized capuchin slits bring a touch of madness, contrasting with the classic appearance of the outfit.

cgv.title: Terms and Conditions of Sale
cgv.sec1Text1: These General Terms and Conditions of Sale (GTCS) govern the sales of products made on the website www.arno-polynice.com, published by PAUGAIN ADELSON (trade name: Arno Polynice), sole proprietor in micro-enterprise, domiciled at 68 rue André Vitu, 88000 Épinal, France.
cgv.sec1Text2: SIRET: 103 064 036 00017 — APE code: 14.13Z (Manufacture of outerwear). VAT not applicable, art. 293B of the French Tax Code.
cgv.sec1Text3: Any order placed on the website implies full and entire acceptance of these GTCS.
cgv.sec2Text1: The products offered for sale are those described on the website at the time of consultation. The photographs illustrating the products do not fall within the contractual scope. If errors have been introduced, the seller's liability cannot be engaged.
cgv.sec2Text2: Some products are made to order. In this case, delivery times will be indicated on the product page.
cgv.sec3Text1: Prices are indicated in euros (€) all taxes included. Arno Polynice is not subject to VAT in accordance with article 293B of the French General Tax Code.
cgv.sec3Text2: Delivery charges are indicated before order validation and are added to the price of the products. Arno Polynice reserves the right to modify its prices at any time; products are invoiced on the basis of the rates in effect at the time of the order.
cgv.sec4Text1: The customer selects the products they wish to order and validates the order by clicking on the confirmation button. An order confirmation email is automatically sent to the email address provided by the customer.
cgv.sec4Text2: Arno Polynice reserves the right to cancel or refuse any order from a customer with whom there is a dispute.
cgv.sec5Text1: Payment is made by credit card (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) via the secure Shopify Payments platform. Payment is debited when the order is validated.
cgv.sec5Text2: Transactions are secured by an SSL (Secure Socket Layer) encryption system.
cgv.sec6Text1: Deliveries are made in metropolitan France. Delivery times depend on product availability:
cgv.sec6Item2: : the delivery time is specified on the product page
cgv.sec6Text2: Delivery charges are calculated according to the weight and destination of the order, and are indicated to the customer before payment validation.
cgv.sec6Text3: Arno Polynice cannot be held responsible for delivery delays attributable to the carrier or in the event of force majeure.
cgv.sec7Text1Part1: In accordance with articles L221-18 and following of the French Consumer Code, the customer has a period of
cgv.sec7Text1Part2: from receipt of the product to exercise their right of withdrawal, without having to justify a reason or pay a penalty.
cgv.sec7Text2: To exercise this right, the customer must notify their decision by email to arnopolynice@gmail.com.
cgv.sec7Text3: The product must be returned in its original condition, unworn, unwashed, with all its tags. Return costs are the responsibility of the customer.
cgv.sec7Text4: The refund will be made within 14 days following receipt of the returned product, by the same means of payment used for the order.
cgv.sec8Text1: All products benefit from the legal warranty of conformity (articles L217-4 and following of the French Consumer Code) and the warranty for hidden defects (articles 1641 and following of the French Civil Code).
cgv.sec8Text2: In the event of a defective or non-compliant product, the customer can contact Arno Polynice at arnopolynice@gmail.com to obtain an exchange or a refund.
cgv.sec9TextPart1: The information collected when placing an order is necessary for processing it. For more information on the processing of your data, please consult our
cgv.sec10Text1: These GTCS are subject to French law. In case of dispute, an amicable solution will be sought before any legal action. Failing this, the competent courts of the seller's registered office shall have sole jurisdiction.
cgv.sec10Text2Part1: In accordance with the provisions of the French Consumer Code concerning the amicable settlement of disputes, the customer may use the consumer mediation service. The mediator can be contacted via the European online dispute resolution platform:

privacy.sec6Text1Part2: for its operation (cart management, login session). No advertising cookies or third-party trackers are deposited.

privacy.sec7Intro: Your personal data is never sold to third parties. It may be shared with the following service providers, strictly necessary for the execution of our services:
privacy.sec7Item2: : for the delivery of your orders

privacy.sec8Intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
privacy.sec8Item1: : obtain a copy of your personal data
privacy.sec8Item3: : request the deletion of your data
privacy.sec8Item4: : oppose the processing of your data

privacy.sec8Contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at: arnopolynice@gmail.com.
privacy.sec8Cnil: If you believe that the processing of your data is not compliant, you may file a complaint with the CNIL (French Data Protection Authority): www.cnil.fr.
privacy.sec9Text: We implement all the technical and organizational measures necessary to ensure the security of your personal data. Payments are secured by SSL encryption via Shopify Payments. We do not store any banking data.
privacy.sec10Text: Arno Polynice reserves the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Modifications take effect upon their publication on the website. We invite you to consult this page regularly.
